notes: Total/grand total of a commodity. ŠU.NÍGIN = ŠUNIGIN = sum total.
Total of 'your' silver/tin/copper. -pi-ka = your (for silver), -ki-ka for tin.

tr: The total declared value of the shipment: {AMT_TR}.
notes: Total declared value (awītum) of a caravan shipment.
Specification/thereof: I gave N of commodity to person. ŠÀ.BA = SA.BA = thereof.
Specification/thereof: person took N of commodity.

tr: Thereof I paid {AMT_TR} as import duty.
notes: Thereof I paid N as nishatum (import duty/excise).
Thereof I received N of commodity.
Thereof person will pay N for items.
Breakdown: N of commodity thereof belongs to person.
Separately/further/in addition (ahāma). Introduces additional items or amounts.
Separately/in addition I gave N to person.
Separately/in addition person took N of commodity.
Further, person entrusted me with N of commodity.
Expense-tin (annakum qātim): tin given for travel/operational expenses.
N textiles of type X belonging to person.
N textiles sold/exchanged for N silver.
Kutānu-textiles priced at N shekels per piece.
Textile count attributed to person (memo listing style).
Textiles used as wrapping for tin ingots in transport.

tl: {AMT_TL} TÚG.ḪI.A i-na {AMT2_TL} mu-ta-tim ú {AMT3_TL} e-li-a-tim dar-ku-ú
tr: {AMT_TR} textiles are packed in {AMT2_TR} half-packs and {AMT3_TR} top-packs.
notes: Textiles packed in half-packs (mutātum) and top-packs (eliātum).

tr: {AMT_TR} packages of refined silver, {AMT2_TR} minas each was their weight.
notes: Silver packages (nēpišum) with specified weight each.

tl: {AMT_TL} na-ru-uq ŠE-am {AMT2_TL} GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR a-na na-ru-qí-im
tr: {AMT_TR} sacks of barley at {AMT2_TR} shekels of silver per sack.
notes: Sacks of barley priced at N shekels per sack.

tl: {AMT_TL} GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ší-im {AMT2_TL} na-ru-uq ŠE-im iš-tí {PN1_TL}
tr: {AMT_TR} shekels of silver, the price of {AMT2_TR} sacks of barley, is owed by {PN1_TR}.
notes: Price of grain sacks as debt owed by person.

tr: {AMT_TR} sacks of barley, {AMT2_TR} sacks of wheat: {PN1_TR}.
notes: Grain listing: N sacks barley, N sacks wheat attributed to person.

tr: {AMT_TR} loaves of bread, {AMT2_TR} pots of oil: {PN1_TR}.
notes: Bread and oil rations attributed to person.
Specific amount paid as import duty (nishātum).

tr: {AMT_TR} textiles were deducted for you as import tax.

tl: {AMT_TL} TÚG a-na ší-mì-im i-na É.GAL-lim i-le-qé-ú
tr: {AMT_TR} textiles have been taken on pre-emption in the palace.
notes: Palace pre-emption right to purchase textiles at fixed price.

tr: {AMT_TR} textiles and {AMT2_TR} shekels of silver are his tithe.
{PN1_TR} has been paid the transport tariff.
From {PLACE_TR} to {PLACE2_TR} the road-tax was {AMT_TR} shekels per talent.
notes: Road-tax (dātum) per talent for a route segment.

tl: iš-tù A-lim{ki} a-dí {PLACE_TL} 1 GÚ-tám {AMT_TL} da-tum ik-šu-dam
tr: From the City until {PLACE_TR} the toll-and-fees amounted to {AMT_TR} per talent.
notes: Total road-tax from the City to destination per talent.

tr: {AMT_TR} of tin: the import duty of the palace.
notes: Tin paid as palace import duty.

tr: {AMT_TR} of tin: the fees for {AMT2_TR} textiles belonging to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Tin paid as fees for textiles belonging to person.
Head-tax per person on caravan personnel.

Silver amount being the price of a commodity. COMM must not be silver (silver prices silver is nonsensical). weight_only restricts to weight-based commodities; exclude_silver further bars silver/KÙ.BABBAR entries.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of {AMT2_TR} kutānu-textiles.
{AMT_TR} of silver, the price of the slave.
notes: Silver as price of a slave.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, the price of copper.
{AMT_TR} of silver, the price of a black ox.
{AMT_TR} of copper, the price of rations.
{AMT_TR} {COMM_TR} have been sold in {PLACE_TR} for {AMT2_TR} of silver.
notes: Goods sold in a place for silver.

tr: {AMT_TR} of tin at the rate in silver 1 to {AMT2_TR}, its price in silver: {AMT3_TR}.
notes: Tin at exchange rate to silver with silver equivalent.

tr: at the rate {AMT_TR}:1 for my tin.
All this, under my seals, I entrusted to {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} under my seal I entrusted to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Specific amount entrusted under seal to person.

tl: mì-ma a-nim ku-nu-ki-a {PN1_TL} áp-qí-id-ma a-na A-lim{ki} ú-bi-il5
tr: All this, under my seals, I entrusted to {PN1_TR} and he brought it to the City.
notes: All goods under seal entrusted to person who brought them to Assur.

tl: a-na {PN1_TL} áp-qí-id-ma a-na {PLACE_TL} a-na ší-a-ma-tim ú-šé-bi-il5-šu
tr: I entrusted to {PN1_TR} and sent it with him to {PLACE_TR} for purchases.
notes: Goods entrusted for purchases in a specific place.

tr: {PN1_TR} brings you {AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} under my seal.
notes: Person brings commodity to addressee under sender's seal.

tr: {PN1_TR} is leading to you all of this.
notes: Person driving goods with donkeys to addressee.

tr: I invested {AMT_TR} {COMM_TR} in the caravan of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Invested goods in the caravan of person.

tr: further, {AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} in their second transport.
notes: Goods sent in the second caravan trip.

tl: {AMT_TL} GÍN ig-re ANŠE ù sá-ri-dí-im iš-tù {PLACE_TL} a-dí {PLACE2_TL} áš-qúl
tr: I paid {AMT_TR} shekels for the hire of a donkey and donkey-driver from {PLACE_TR} to {PLACE2_TR}.
notes: Hire of donkey and driver for a route.

tl: {AMT_TL} AN.NA iš-tù {PLACE_TL} a-dí {PLACE2_TL} a-na ig-re e-re-qí-im
tr: {AMT_TR} of tin from {PLACE_TR} until {PLACE2_TR} as hire for a wagon.
notes: Tin paid as wagon hire for a route segment.

tl: {AMT_TL} ša bi-lá-tim iš-tù {PLACE_TL} a-dí {PLACE2_TL} {AMT2_TL} GÍN.TA áš-qúl
tr: For {AMT_TR} porters from {PLACE_TR} until {PLACE2_TR} at {AMT2_TR} shekels each I paid.
notes: Porter hire per person for a route.

tl: {AMT_TL} SÍG.ḪI.A {AMT2_TL} maš-ku {AMT3_TL} ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu ú ú-nu-sú-nu
tr: {AMT_TR} of wool, {AMT2_TR} fleeces, {AMT3_TR} black donkeys plus their harness.
notes: Wool, fleeces, and donkeys as a transport consignment.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, the working capital of {PN1_TR}.
{AMT_TR} of silver for a working capital for {PN1_TR}.
notes: Silver given as working capital to person.

tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} to {PN1_TR} as an investment loan.
{AMT_TR} of silver, his free loan for {PN1_TR}.
I gave {AMT_TR} as a free loan to {PN1_TR}.
notes: Gave amount as free loan to person.

tr: {AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} I have as investment share in the joint-stock capital of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Investment share in narūqum (joint-stock fund) of person.

tr: with {PN1_TR} and {PN2_TR} as witnesses we settled accounts.

notes: Two persons cleared their mutual accounts.

tr: The rest of your silver is {AMT_TR} of silver.
the rest of your tin: {AMT_TR} of tin.
The rest of the textiles: {AMT_TR} textiles were cleared.

tl: ŠU.NÍGIN {AMT_TL} ku-ta-nu ša {PN1_TL} a-na É.GAL-lim e-ru-bu
tr: in all: {AMT_TR} kutānus belonging to {PN1_TR} entered the palace.
notes: Textiles entered the palace for sale/pre-emption.

tr: and {AMT_TR} kutānus were lost in the palace.

notes: Silver amount attributed to person (colon-style listing).
Bare listing: N shekels then person name.
Bare listing: N minas then person name.
Gave goods to person for purchasing.

tr: I gave {AMT_TR} of {COMM_TR} for his expenses.
I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to {PN1_TR} for his sacrifices.
notes: Silver given for sacrificial offerings when going to the City.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver I gave them for their food.
{AMT_TR} of silver in {PLACE_TR} for the inn.
notes: Silver spent at an inn in a specific city.

tr: {AMT_TR} of copper were spent until I left {PLACE_TR}.
notes: Copper spent during stay until departure.

tr: All this I paid out on behalf of {PN1_TR}.
notes: All expenses paid on behalf of person.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver, votive offerings for Aššur.
notes: Silver designated as votive offerings for Aššur.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver and its interest due from {PN1_TR}.
notes: Silver plus interest owed by person.

tr: {AMT_TR} of refined silver is owed by {PN1_TR}.

notes: All the above items are for/belonging to person.

tr: All this I left behind to {PN1_TR}.
notes: All items left behind/deposited with person.

tl: iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša {PN1_TL} a-na {AMT_TL} ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
tr: Reckoned from the week of {PN1_TR} he will pay in {AMT_TR} weeks.
notes: Payment reckoned from hamuštum-week of named eponym.

tr: a tablet about {AMT_TR} of silver of {PN1_TR}.
notes: Tablet documenting a debt/amount of silver of person.

tr: The tablet was written because of {PN1_TR}.

tl: ta-ah-sí-sà-tum ša ší-be ša ší-im {COMM_TL} ša {PN1_TL}
tr: Memorandum with witnesses concerning the proceeds of {PN1_TR}'s {COMM_TR}.
notes: Memorandum header with witnesses about commodity proceeds.

tr: {PN1_TR} placed the unopened missive in our hands.

notes: Silver or tin beads attributed to person.
Listing of male and female slaves.
Date formula: month name and eponym year.

tl: {AMT_TL} AN.NA i-na {PLACE_TL} a-na É ub-ri a-dí-in
tr: {AMT_TR} of tin I gave in {PLACE_TR} to the inn.
notes: Tin given at an inn in a specific place.

tl: {AMT_TL} AN.NA i-na {PLACE_TL} a-na GAL sí-ki-tim a-dí-in
tr: {AMT_TR} of tin I gave in {PLACE_TR} to the commander.
notes: Tin given to a local official.

tl: i-nu-mì {PN1_TL} a-ša-sú e-ḫu-zu {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-ší-tí-šu a-dí-in
tr: When {PN1_TR} married his wife I gave {AMT_TR} of silver to his wife.

tl: {AMT_TL} KÙ.BABBAR i-nu-mì {PN1_TL} a-na A-lim{ki} i-li-ku ak-ru-ub-šu-um
tr: When {PN1_TR} went to the City I dedicated {AMT_TR} of silver as a blessing for him.
notes: Silver dedicated as blessing when person went to Assur.

tr: I took {AMT_TR} kutānus for my journey.

tl: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um {PLACE_TL} i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
tr: The {PLACE_TR} colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony.
notes: Proceedings for colonies other than Kanesh.
Left with (ezebum, e-zi-ib) variant with commodity.

tr: {AMT_TR} of silver under my seal I left with {PN1_TR}.

notes: Standalone i-na li-bi4 + PN (no i-šu) = possession. Attested: '4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-na li-bi4 A-šùr-ma-lik' → '4 minas of silver is in the possession of Aššur-malik.'
i-li-bi4 spelling variant. Attested: '4 ⅙ GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-li-bi4 Hu-ra-ṣa-nim' → '4 ⅙ shekels of silver is in Huraṣānum's possession.'
'is with PN' variant. Attested: '46 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na li-bi I-dí-Sú-en' → '46 minas of refined silver are with Idī-Suen.'
i-li-bi4 variant of 'is with'. Attested: '43 ½ ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-li-bi4 Šu-li' → '43 ½ minas 5 shekels of refined silver is with Šulī.'
Summary line. Attested: 'mì-ma a-nim i-na li-bi4 Dan-A-šùr' → 'All these things are with Dān-Aššur.'

tr: The rest of the {COMM_TR} remains in {PN1_TR}'s possession.
notes: Remainder + a-hu-ur (outstanding). Attested: 'ší-tí hu-sà-ri-im i-li-bi Šu-Ištar a-hu-ur' → 'The rest of the lapis lazuli remains in Šu-Ištar's possession.'
